name: 60" Wide Covered Storage Closet White - Brightroom™: Portable Garment Rack, Steel Frame, Adult Assembly Required
description:
You're sure to appreciate the convenience and organization this 60-Inch Wide Covered Storage Closet from Brightroom™ brings to your space. Made of a rust-resistant metal frame, this wide storage closet features one rod for organizing different hangers to help your space look and feel clean. Best of all, it features a white cover with a zipper on the front that helps keep the clothes hidden from view.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
